title: BEAM Therapeutics Risto-cel Biomarker Data at EHA2026
text: Beam Therapeutics announced presentation of updated biomarker data from Phase 1/2 BEACON trial evaluating ristoglogene autogetemcel (risto-cel) for sickle cell disease at the European Hematology Association annual meeting. Updated biomarker data further underscore risto-cel's ability to restore red blood cell health and function in sickle cell disease patients. Clinical data demonstrates durable hemoglobin F induction with sustained reduction in hemoglobin S levels and resolution of vaso-occlusive crises. Multiple patient cohorts show sustained clinical benefit with extended follow-up. These updated results support the clinical development pathway toward BLA submission expected year-end 2026. International presentation of risto-cel data at major hematology conferences increases visibility among global clinicians and medical community. Positive biomarker and clinical data support potential commercial value and differentiation of risto-cel in sickle cell disease market.
